title: ChestLock999
description: Secure your valuables and prevent theft with ChestLock999, the essential plugin that turns any container into a personal, impenetrable vault.
body:
# ChestLock999 - The Ultimate Container Protection

   Secure Your Loot with Ease!


  Tired of other players stealing your hard-earned diamonds and precious resources? ChestLock999 is the
  simple, yet powerful solution to protect your containers from griefers and thieves. With an easy-to-use
  command-based system, you can lock any container and control exactly who has access to it.

   Features


   * Universal Locking: Lock any container, including Chests, Barrels, Shulker Boxes, Furnaces, and more!
* 
  | Command          | Description                                      | Usage              |
  | ---------------- | ------------------------------------------------ | ------------------ |
  | /lock          | Locks the container you are looking at.          | /lock            |
  | /unlock        | Unlocks the container you are looking at.        | /unlock          |
  | /trust <player>| Trusts a player to access your locked containers.| /trust <player>  |
  | /untrust <player>| Revokes a player's access to your containers.    | /untrust <player>|

   Permissions

  ChestLock999 uses a straightforward permission system.


  | Permission           | Description                               | Default |
  | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------- | ------- |
  | chestlock999.basic | Allows access to all ChestLock999 commands. | true  |


  By default, all players have permission to use the plugin. You can customize this using a permissions
  plugin if you wish to restrict access.

  ## How to Use


   1. Locking a Container: Look at the container you want to lock and type /lock.
   1. Download the ChestLock999.jar file.
  Protect your valuables and play with peace of mind. Download ChestLock999 today!
